acceptance_criteria: 1) Default runtime behavior is explicit in code and docs. 2) Builder fallback behavior is tested for both feature-enabled and test contexts. 3) Misconfiguration paths fail loudly where intended.
description: Decide and enforce default runtime selection semantics (StubRuntime-only for tests vs PyO3Runtime default when feature enabled). Make builder/runtime fallback behavior explicit and documented to avoid surprising no-op runtime execution in production.
title: Set default runtime behavior policy and builder semantics
